unit.note: F0 fresh gate green. Server vitest 166 files / 1924 passed + 1 skipped (1925) (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local) + npm run build green. Client vitest 203 files / 1972 passed + npm run build green (client re-run for completeness though no client/** file changed; detect_frontend_changes.py has_frontend_changes=false). New D14 coverage lives in the scripts node:test suite (node --test scripts/stop-server.test.mjs scripts/start-server-production.test.mjs): 30 passed - the NEW stop-server.test.mjs (9 tests: structure guard + $env:PORT/3847 derivation + kill-sweep-uses-variable + message-uses-variable + single-$Port-reuse + no-stray-3847) plus a parity block added to start-server-production.test.mjs (kill+poll both -LocalPort $Port, child-scoped launch env `set PORT=$Port`, failure-message-uses-$Port, single-$Port-reuse, no-stray-3847). AC2 proven RED-first on pre-fix main (11/20 failed with the final assertions: the ps1 hardcoded 3847), green after (30 passed). Counts: 1924 server + 1972 client + 30 scripts = 3926 passed / 3927 total (the scripts node:test suite is separate from the vitest workspaces, folded into the reported count here).

integration.note: Confidence-calibration probes of the operator-env -> $Port -> OS-port-table/launched-child/messages boundary, run REAL on this Win11 box under Windows PowerShell 5.1 (producer = $env:PORT + repo-root .env.local; consumer = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $Port, the launched node child env, operator messages). (1) Derivation edge-input probe: the exact `if ($env:PORT -match '^\d{1,5}$') { [int]$env:PORT } else { 3847 }` under 8 inputs -> unset->3847, '4000'->4000, ''->3847, 'abc'->3847, '3847 '->3847, '99999999999'->3847 (overflow degraded, NO throw - validates the code-review overflow fix), '0'->0 (parity with .sh keeping '0'), '65535'->65535; all graceful, no throws. (2) Runtime query+message+child-cmd probe (read-only, no kill): PORT=4999 -> $Port=4999, Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $Port accepted the variable and ran (0 listeners on 4999), messages interpolated '...port 4999.', inner cmd rendered `set "PORT=4999"&& node --env-file-if-exists=../.env.local dist/index.js`. Two consecutive clean probes => asymptote reached, boundary calibrated. Edge not probed: the FULL scripts (they Stop-Process real listeners + rebuild/restart the live server - out of safe-probe scope; those primitives are UNCHANGED from pre-fix, only the port variable threaded through them changed).

e2e.note: No Playwright run. This iterate touches ONLY scripts/start-server-production.ps1 + scripts/stop-server.ps1 (Windows production operator scripts) + their co-located node:test files - no client/src or server/src file, no DOM/route/component, no Vite-config/proxy/WS-origin/CORS surface. detect_frontend_changes.py reports has_frontend_changes=false (nothing under client/**). F0.5 surface=none (see surface_verification); a browser smoke exercises nothing these operator scripts affect.

surface_verification.justification: This iterate changes only scripts/start-server-production.ps1 and scripts/stop-server.ps1 (the Windows production start/stop operator scripts) + their co-located node:test files. No file under client/src or server/src is touched - detect_frontend_changes.py reports has_frontend_changes=false, so there is genuinely no browser/DOM/route/Vite-config/proxy/WS/CORS surface to verify. The behavior (both scripts must honor $env:PORT with a 3847 default for the kill sweep, launch env, readiness poll, and operator messages, mirroring the .sh twins) is only observable by running the scripts under PowerShell, which the structural node:test pins (derivation + variable-in-every-sink + no-stray-3847, AC2 RED-first on pre-fix main: hardcoded 3847 -> 11/20 failed, green after 30 passed) and the empirical on-Windows PowerShell probes reproduce (derivation degrades all edge inputs to 3847 without throwing; Get-NetTCPConnection accepts $Port; messages + child cmd interpolate the resolved port). F0.5 surface=none - no fabricated browser run.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 - start-server-production.ps1 and stop-server.ps1 derive $Port once from $env:PORT (default 3847) and use it for the kill sweep, the launched server env, the readiness poll, and every operator message; the custom-PORT failure scenario (old server survives, EADDRINUSE, wrong 'port 3847' diagnosis) no longer reproduces.
behaviors.evidence: stop-server.test.mjs + start-server-production.test.mjs pin -LocalPort $Port on the kill sweep (both scripts) and the readiness poll (start), `set PORT=$Port` on the launch child env (start), and $Port interpolation in the 'nothing was running on port' + 'did NOT come up on port' messages; a single $Port is derived from $env:PORT and reused in every sink. Empirical PowerShell probe: PORT=4999 -> $Port=4999 flows to the cmdlet query + messages + child cmd.

behaviors.behavior: AC2 - a NEW regression test is RED on pre-fix main and GREEN after.
behaviors.evidence: NEW scripts/stop-server.test.mjs created (modeled on start-server-production.test.mjs) + a parity block added to start-server-production.test.mjs. RED captured on pre-fix main (ps1 hardcoded 3847) via `git stash push` of the two ps1 files with the final assertions in place: 20 tests, 9 pass, 11 fail. GREEN after restoring the fix: node --test over both files -> 30 passed / 0 failed.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - full server (1924) + client (1972) suites + both builds stay green; no invariant/ADR regressed.
behaviors.evidence: Server vitest 166 files / 1924 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local) + npm run build green; client vitest 203 files / 1972 passed + npm run build green. Read-only-observer rules 1/12 intact (the scripts write only into %USERPROFILE%\.shipwright-webui\; no ~/.claude/projects/** or shipwright_run_config.json).

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - files stay within the expected footprint; bloat baseline not ratcheted.
behaviors.evidence: Footprint: scripts/start-server-production.ps1 (167 -> 183) + scripts/stop-server.ps1 (18 -> 26) [the 2 spec'd source files] + scripts/stop-server.test.mjs (new, 124) + scripts/start-server-production.test.mjs (126 -> 234) [the AC2-mandated tests] - all < 300, none in shipwright_bloat_baseline.json (no new crossing, baseline unchanged). Serial #14, deps/blocks none, D01-D13 merged -> no live parallel collision.
